sourceSummary.oneLine: IECEE CB Scheme CB Test Certificate for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models G1717 and G1417 series.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents that a sample of the product was tested and found in conformity with listed IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-6 standards, with additional EN evaluations.
keyPoints: Applicant, manufacturer, and factory are H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
The issuing National Certification Body is UL Solutions (Demko), Denmark.
Test Report Ref. No. ACTS-2024-SM-241 was issued on 2025-02-20.
Certificate date is 2025-02-21 and signature name shown is Thomas Wilson.

evidence.claim: The certificate reference number is DK-163345-UL.
The product covered is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The listed product model references are G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, and G1417FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: Model / Type Ref. G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Models

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. is named as applicant, manufacturer, and factory.
evidence.evidenceText: Name and address of the applicant H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the factory H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The equipment rating is 15 V d.c., 6 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Ratings and principal characteristics Equipment: 15 V d.c., 6 A
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Electrical Ratings

evidence.claim: The certified AC/DC adaptor input is 100-240 V a.c., 50-60 Hz, 1.3 A-0.5 A, and output is 15 V d.c., 6.0 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Certified AC/DC Adaptor: - Input: 100-240 V a.c., 50-60 Hz, 1.3 A-0.5 A - Output: 15 V d.c., 6.0 A

evidence.claim: The internally powered rating is 11.55 V d.c., 6660 mAh (3330 mAh x 2 EA).
evidence.evidenceText: Internally powered: 11.55 V d.c., 6660 mAh (3330 mAh x 2 EA)
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Electrical Ratings

evidence.claim: A sample was tested and found in conformity with IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-6 listed versions and amendments.
evidence.evidenceText: A sample of the product was tested and found to be in conformity with IEC 60601-1:2005, IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012, IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD2:2020, IEC 60601-1-6:2010, IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD1:2013, IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD2:2020

evidence.claim: The certificate forms part of Test Report Ref. No. ACTS-2024-SM-241 issued on 2025-02-20.
evidence.evidenceText: As shown in the Test Report Ref. No. which forms part of this Certificate ACTS-2024-SM-241 issued on 2025-02-20

evidence.claim: The certificate was issued by UL Solutions (Demko), Denmark as the selected National Certification Body.
evidence.evidenceText: This CB Test Certificate is issued by the National Certification Body ... UL Solutions (Demko), Borupvang 5A DK -2750 Ballerup, DENMARK

evidence.claim: The product was additionally evaluated to listed EN 60601-1 and EN 60601-1-6 versions and amendments.

reviewFlags.reason: No revision or version field for the certificate is present in the source text.
Trademark / Brand and Customer Testing Facility stage fields appear without populated values.
OCR/text extraction includes checkbox glyphs and line breaks around the selected National Certification Body; selection is interpreted from the checked box next to UL Solutions (Demko).
